com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl

Class TESelectionRequest

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.AbstractTERequest
      • com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.TESelectionRequest
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ITERequest

    public class TESelectionRequest
extends AbstractTERequest
    A selection request is used to get an index of the selected option (see getButtonLabels() for options) when using the TTlibrary functions messageBox or timedMessageBox. The index should be returned as an integer response from the management, see IntegerTEResponse.
    Since:
    TTworkbench 15

    • Nested Class Summary

      • Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.ITERequest

        ITERequest.Kind

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      TESelectionRequest(java.lang.String sessionId, java.lang.String title, java.lang.String description, java.lang.String[] buttonLabels, int defaultButtonIndex)
      An SUT request for choosing a verdict.
      TESelectionRequest(java.lang.String sessionId, java.lang.String title, java.lang.String description, java.lang.String[] buttonLabels, int defaultButtonIndex, float duration)
      An SUT request for choosing a verdict within a given duration.

    • Constructor Detail

      • TESelectionRequest

        public TESelectionRequest(java.lang.String sessionId,
                          java.lang.String title,
                          java.lang.String description,
                          java.lang.String[] buttonLabels,
                          int defaultButtonIndex)
        An SUT request for choosing a verdict. Should return the index of the button chosen by the user.
        Parameters:
        title - the title for the SUT request window
        description - the description for the SUT request
        buttonLabels - labels of the buttons to display in the dialog
        defaultButtonIndex - the button index selected by default

      • TESelectionRequest

        public TESelectionRequest(java.lang.String sessionId,
                          java.lang.String title,
                          java.lang.String description,
                          java.lang.String[] buttonLabels,
                          int defaultButtonIndex,
                          float duration)
        An SUT request for choosing a verdict within a given duration. Should return the index of the button chosen by the user. After the given duration is expired the default value (defaultButtonIndex) is returned.
        Parameters:
        title - the title for the SUT request window
        description - the description for the SUT request
        buttonLabels - of the buttons to display in the dialog
        defaultButtonIndex - labels the button index selected by default
        duration - the duration the SUT request should be active in seconds, -1 waits indefinite

    • Method Detail

      • getTitle

        public java.lang.String getTitle()
        Returns:
        the dialog title

      • getDefaultButtonIndex

        public int getDefaultButtonIndex()
        Get the button index selected by default
        Returns:
        defaultButtonIndex

      • getDuration

        public float getDuration()
        Get the duration the SUT request should be active in seconds, Float.POSITIVE_INFINITY means wait indefinite
        Returns:
        duration
